release_body: The elastic scattering enhancement contribution was underestimated. This contribution is usually less than 1 % and therefore no big changes are to be expected.

##### Downloads

- [Source code (zip)](https://github.com/rasbt/biopandas/releases/tag/v0.2.0)
- [Source code (tar.gz)](https://github.com/rasbt/biopandas/releases/tag/v0.2.0.tar.gz)

##### New Features

- Added an `amino3to1` method to `PandasPdb` data frames to convert 3-amino acid letter codes to 1-letter codes.
- Added a `distance` method to `PandasPdb` data frames to compute the Euclidean distance between atoms and a reference point.
- Added the `PandasMol2` class for working with Tripos MOL2 files in pandas DataFrames.


##### Changes

- `PandasPDB` was renamed to `PandasPdb`.
- Raises a warning if `PandasPdb` is written to PDB and ATOM and HETAM section contains unexpected columns; these columns will now be skipped.

##### Bug Fixes

- -

release_name: New setting to trust all proxies
release_body:
Contributed by @MetricMike:

Introduces a new setting ``IPRESTRICT_TRUST_ALL_PROXIES``.

Use this setting when using a managed proxy with a dynamic IP (like when behind an AWS Load Balancer, or other cloud equivalent). When this setting is True, Django IP Restrict will always check the HTTP X-Forwarded-For header to determine the true client IP address.

We are preparing for the 1.1.0 release, try out this release candidate and give us valuable feedback!
